sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The output didn't show Green 3's boundary. Let me check the segmentation again to see where Green 3 is now.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"Green: pixels={n['pixels']} bound={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"W center: pixels={n['pixels']} bound={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

    if n['color'] == 'W' and 3 <= n['pixels'] <= 10:
        print(f"W center: pixels={n['pixels']} bound={n['boundary']}")

</parameter>
